response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer and Staff Engineer, but their background is heavily skewed toward JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages, with limited recent or focused experience in Java. While they meet most educational and technical requirements, their lack of depth in Java and agile project experience in insurance IT sectors makes them a less ideal fit for this entry-level role.
strengths: Strong software development background with diverse language expertise
Experience with agile methodologies (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Proven ability to work in collaborative and innovative environments
concerns: Limited recent or in-depth Java experience (primary requirement)
German language proficiency is only basic (required fluent)
Overqualified for an entry-level role, which may lead to disengagement or role mismatch
